name: pcconfighub
description: Your personal hub for PC parts, builds and hardware configurations.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,mobile -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace pc-config-hub-web" "npm run dev --workspace pc-config-hub--mobile"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace pc-config-hub-web && npm run build --workspace pc-config-hub--mobile && npm run build --workspace pc-config-hub-shared

author: Anton Petrov
